title: Move category tag next to live viewer count and remove LIVE badge in chatroom header

requirements.text: In the chatroom header component, remove the LIVE badge entirely.

quotes: remove the live badge since it's redundant

acceptanceCriteria: The LIVE badge is no longer rendered anywhere in the chatroom header.
No other elements are affected by this removal.

requirements.text: In the chatroom header component, move the category tag into the same row as the messages count and live viewer count, positioned to the right of the live viewer count. Do not change any styles on the category tag or any other elements.

quotes: place the category tag to the right of the live viewer count

acceptanceCriteria: The category tag appears in the same row as the messages count and live viewer count.
The category tag is positioned to the right of the live viewer count.
The title has its own line above with full available width, unaffected by the category tag.
No CSS classes, colors, sizes, or any other styles are changed on any elements.

constraints: No style changes whatsoever — only structural/positional changes to element placement.
Only the chatroom header component is to be modified.
No other components, files, or logic may be changed.
nonGoals: Restyling or resizing the category tag or any other badge.
Changes to the lobby/chatroom card components.
Adding new UI elements or features.
